features: Dove Advanced Care Go Fresh Pomegranate Scent Anti-Perspirant Roll On Deodorant offers long-lasting protection, underarm care and a juicy scent
An anti-perspirant women's deodorant providing up to 72 hours of sweat and odour protection
Featuring Triple Moisturising technology, this roll on protects delicate underarm skin from irritation caused by shaving, leaving it feeling softer and smoother
Our kindest-to-skin 0% alcohol formula, combining gentle care with expert deodorant protection
Infused with a luscious pomegranate fragrance, this roll on is perfect for a morning wake-up call or a boost of freshness on the go
Dove does not test on animals anywhere in the world, and this anti-perspirant deodorant is certified PETA-Approved Vegan and Cruelty-Free
description: Product Description Lasting anti-perspirant protection, a dose of care and a refreshing pomegranate scent – who says you can’t have it all? Try Dove Advanced Care Go Fresh Pomegranate Anti-Perspirant Roll On Deodorant for a fresh feeling and the perfect morning wake-up call. This anti-perspirant women's deodorant is carefully formulated to be kind to your delicate underarms. Made with 0% alcohol, it provides the utmost care even after shaving, leaving your skin feeling soft, smooth and beautifully protected. For an ultra-moisturising deodorant, the unique Triple Moisturising technology featured in this roll on contains three different moisturisers to give it the ultra-hydrating benefits of expert skin care staples. They work by boosting your skin’s moisture barrier to help retain moisture deeper within the skin and prevent it from evaporating by locking your skin’s external barrier. Plus, this beautifully scented deodorant is perfect for a morning boost, with a juicy pomegranate fragrance to keep you feeling confident and smelling great all day. For best results, apply Dove Go Fresh Pomegranate roll on deodorant to clean, dry skin. Simply move the rollerball in a circular motion over each underarm to ensure you’ve covered the area completely. Enjoy underarm skin that feels beautiful and smells great. This deodorant roll on comes in 100% recyclable packaging – please recycle. Globally, Dove does not test on animals, and this anti-perspirant deodorant for women is PETA-Approved Vegan. PETA certified as Cruelty-Free, Dove products carry PETA’s Beauty Without Bunnies logo for added peace of mind Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Steareth-2, Parfum, Steareth-20, Calcium Chloride, Glycine, Disodium EDTA, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-di-t-butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate, Benzyl Alcohol, Limonene, Linalool. Directions Apply Dove Advanced Care Go Fresh Pomegranate Scent Anti-perspirant Deodorant Roll-On to clean, dry skin. Hold one arm above your head and apply to your underarm in light circles. Repeat under the other arm. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
